results.title: n8n Quick Start Tutorial: Build Your First Workflow [2025]
results.reason: As the official channel, it focuses on conceptual foundations and core nodes, which comments highlight as the most structured starting point for true beginners.
summary: Learn how to navigate the main dashboard
Connect different apps to work together automatically
Set up a simple trigger to start tasks
Move data between services without writing code

results.title: n8n Quick Start Tutorial: Build Your First AI Agent [2026]
results.reason: Excellent follow-up to the basics, focusing on the AI Agent niche which is the primary use case for n8n in 2025/2026.
summary: Build a smart assistant using artificial intelligence
Connect your workflow to a chat window
Give your AI agent specific tools to use
Automate complex responses using simple logic blocks

results.title: n8n Tutorial for Beginners - Build Your First Free AI Agent
results.reason: Kevin Stratvert is a master of beginner pacing; his videos are consistently cited in comments as the easiest to follow for absolute novices.
summary: Install the software for free on your computer
Create a custom chatbot that answers your questions
Link your AI to real-time online data
Test and run your first automated AI project

results.title: n8n will change your life as a developer...
results.reason: Fireship provides a high-speed, high-production overview that is excellent for conceptual understanding, though it lacks the step-by-step depth of a full tutorial.
summary: Understand why visual coding saves you time
See how to replace expensive subscription tools
Learn to build powerful apps with simple nodes
Discover how to host your own automation server

results.title: n8n Tutorial for Beginners: How to Build AI Automations for FREE (Step-by-Step)
results.reason: Charlie Chang is known for extreme clarity for non-technical audiences, and comments praise the 'step-by-step' nature of the self-hosting guide.
summary: Follow a step-by-step guide for beginners
Automate repetitive daily tasks using smart AI
Connect your email and calendar to n8n
Save money by building your own automation tools
